    HIGH - Enum constant in enum class shelter.domain.ActivityLevel
    High activity; requires an active adopter lifestyle and ample space.
    HOME_MOST_OF_DAY - Enum constant in enum class shelter.domain.DailySchedule
    The adopter is at home for most of the day.
    HOUSE_NO_YARD - Enum constant in enum class shelter.domain.LivingSpace
    A house without a yard; limited outdoor space.
    HOUSE_WITH_YARD - Enum constant in enum class shelter.domain.LivingSpace
    A house with a yard, providing outdoor space for animals.

    match(Adopter, List<Animal>) - Method in interface shelter.service.AdopterBasedMatchingService
    Evaluates each animal in the provided list against the adopter's preferences and returns a ranked list of match results ordered from highest to lowest score.

    Evaluates each animal in the provided list against the adopter's preferences and returns a ranked list of match results ordered from highest to lowest score.

    Evaluates each adopter in the provided list against the given animal and returns a ranked list of match results ordered from highest to lowest score.

    Concrete implementation of VaccinationService that records vaccination events, checks overdue status against each vaccine type's validity period, and queries vaccination history by animal.

    Constructs a new VaccinationServiceImpl with the required repositories and audit service.

    Top-level CLI command group for vaccination management operations.

    VaccineType - Class in shelter.domain
    Represents a type of vaccine that can be administered to animals in the shelter system.
